# ISSUE_TEMPLATE

## Purpose
GitHub issue template forms shown when a contributor opens a new issue. Provides a bug report template and a feature request template.

## Key Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `bug_report.md` | Bug report scaffolding — repro steps, expected vs actual, environment |
| `feature_request.md` | Feature request scaffolding — problem, proposal, alternatives |

## For AI Agents

### Working In This Directory
- Templates use GitHub front-matter (`name`, `about`, `title`, `labels`, `assignees`).
- Keep templates short. Long forms reduce issue submission rate.
- Security disclosures must NOT come through public issues — direct reporters to `security@october-academy.com` (per `CONTRIBUTING.md`).

### Testing Requirements
- None — these render directly on GitHub.

### Common Patterns
- Markdown front-matter at the top, prose body below.

## Dependencies

### Internal
- None.

### External
- GitHub issue templating.
